reasoning: Sprite exhibits strong Echoes-palette color harmony. Candy pink flowers and warm peach skin tones anchor a bright warm mood. Sky-blue fairy wings provide a clean complementary contrast against the pinks without going cold or corporate. Saturated leafy greens complete a near-triadic relationship (pink/blue/green) that reads cheerful and alive. Shadow areas in leaves use deep teal-green and flower darks use deep rose-mauve — colored darks throughout, no pure black or grey in the sprite art itself. No muddy desaturated areas, no neon oversaturation, no goth near-blacks. The parchment-background panel confirms the sprite pops warmly on light grounds. Palette compatibility with reference swatches (sky blue, teal, saturated green, candy pink, parchment gold) is excellent across all hue ranges used.
